code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn classify(_ input: String) -> Unit
  mut evens: List<Int> = []
  mut odds: List<Int> = []
  mut buf = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(input)
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws_byte(b)
          is_sep = true
        else
          is_sep = false
        end
      when None
        is_sep = true
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(buf)
        match string.parse_int(buf)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            evens = list.push(evens, v)
          else
            odds = list.push(odds, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        buf = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut eout = "evens="
  mut efirst = true
  for x in evens
    if efirst
      eout = "#{eout}#{x}"
      efirst = false
    else
      eout = "#{eout} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(eout)

  mut oout = "odds="
  mut ofirst = true
  for y in odds
    if ofirst
      oout = "#{oout}#{y}"
      ofirst = false
    else
      oout = "#{oout} #{y}"
    end
  end
  println(oout)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
classify(input)
